entries.statement: Signal generation and state transitions may use only information available up to and including the decision bar close; no future bar data may influence decisions.
entries.scope: All versions in btc_spot_mainline_lineage_001 under constitution 4.0.
entries.overlap_guard: Always enforce; cannot be relaxed on overlapping or non-overlapping data.
entries.challenge_rule: Only a new constitution version may alter this axiom.

entries.statement: All timestamps, split boundaries, signal timing, and daily aggregation are defined in UTC.
entries.scope: All versions in btc_spot_mainline_lineage_001 under constitution 4.0.
entries.overlap_guard: Always enforce; no local-time reinterpretation is allowed.
entries.challenge_rule: Only a new constitution version may alter this axiom.

entries.statement: Signals are generated at bar close and executed at the next bar open; fills, exposure, and daily returns must respect next-open execution semantics.
entries.scope: All versions in btc_spot_mainline_lineage_001 under constitution 4.0.
entries.overlap_guard: Always enforce; same-bar execution and discretionary fill assumptions are forbidden.
entries.challenge_rule: Only a new constitution version may alter this axiom.

entries.statement: Raw historical bars may be canonicalized and validated, but missing bars must not be synthetically filled or repaired.
entries.basis: research_constitution_v4.0.yaml :: canonical_input_schema / admissible_domain; D1a quality protocol
entries.scope: All versions in btc_spot_mainline_lineage_001 under constitution 4.0.
entries.overlap_guard: Always enforce; gaps may be logged and blocked, not repaired.
entries.challenge_rule: Only a new constitution version may alter this axiom.

entries.statement: Microstructure and order-book detail are outside the mainline swing-horizon search space; admitted research uses canonical OHLCV/taker/trade-count bars only.
entries.scope: Mainline BTC spot swing-horizon seed discovery and forward evaluation under constitution 4.0.
entries.overlap_guard: May guide budget allocation and implementation scope, but must not be used to claim absence of overlapping-data edge.
entries.challenge_rule: May be revised only by governance or non-overlapping evidence under a future constitution/version freeze.
entries.expiry: Until superseded by governance or constitution update.

entries.statement: Layering is a hypothesis to be justified by measured edge and ablation, not a default design pattern.
entries.scope: All candidate design work in btc_spot_mainline_lineage_001.
entries.overlap_guard: May bias toward simpler mechanisms when utility is similar, but cannot pre-eliminate a measured layer on overlapping data without ablation evidence.
entries.challenge_rule: May be revised only by governance or non-overlapping evidence under a future constitution/version freeze.
entries.expiry: Until superseded by governance or constitution update.

entries.statement: On snapshot_20260318 discovery data, slow trend continuation concentrated most cleanly in D1/H4 price-position channels; D1 anti-vol improved H4 continuation quality.
entries.overlap_guard: Must not be elevated to a structural prior or used to narrow blind discovery on overlapping data.
entries.challenge_rule: Any redesign or future forward evidence may falsify or supersede this note.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Long-horizon taker-flow imbalance behaved more like exhaustion/reversal than simple continuation across measured channels in this snapshot.
entries.overlap_guard: Cannot forbid future continuation hypotheses on overlapping data; it only records what this measurement pass observed.
entries.challenge_rule: May be overturned by later measurement on non-overlapping data or forward evidence.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Relative volume was materially stronger as a future-magnitude/timing channel than as a standalone directional engine in this snapshot.
entries.overlap_guard: Advisory only; do not treat this as a permanent channel taxonomy.
entries.challenge_rule: May be challenged by future measurement or forward evidence.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Daily open-gap behavior in BTC spot appeared effectively noisy and did not support a useful directional session-boundary edge in this snapshot.
entries.overlap_guard: Cannot be elevated beyond advisory scope and cannot eliminate future non-overlapping evidence.
entries.challenge_rule: May be revised if a later dataset shows persistent session-boundary structure.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Blind continuation stacking from 1h state into 15m continuation degraded entry quality; 1h-to-15m conditioning favored pullback/recovery states more than same-direction stacking.
entries.overlap_guard: Advisory only; may not pre-empt a differently conditioned lower-timeframe design on overlapping data.
entries.challenge_rule: May be challenged by new measurement or forward evidence.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Candidate btcsd_20260318_c2_flow1hpb failed discovery hard constraints across all main configs and had no eligible post-ablation simplification to rescue its slot.
entries.overlap_guard: This note documents selection outcome only; it does not permanently ban redesign under a future version.
entries.challenge_rule: A later redesign on appended data may supersede this outcome.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Candidate btcsd_20260318_c1_av4h ranked first by adjusted preference on discovery but failed holdout hard constraints due to low activity and low exposure at 50 bps.
entries.overlap_guard: This is not a permanent claim about the mechanism; it records a specific holdout failure in this freeze cycle.
entries.challenge_rule: Future appended evidence or redesign may overturn this note.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Candidate btcsd_20260318_c3_trade4h15m passed holdout hard constraints but showed weak/negative reserve-internal performance, so reserve should be treated as cautionary internal evidence rather than promotion proof.
entries.overlap_guard: Advisory only; reserve_internal is contaminated internal evidence and cannot be treated as clean OOS proof.
entries.challenge_rule: Clean forward evidence after freeze may confirm or refute this caution.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.

entries.statement: Both live candidates carry at least one ABLATION_FAIL, so any future governance review must explicitly revisit whether the failing layers continue to earn their place.
entries.scope: Version V1 governance and review context only.
entries.overlap_guard: This note cannot itself force elimination, but it must remain visible during forward governance review.
entries.challenge_rule: Forward evidence or a future redesign may clear or reinforce the ablation concern.
entries.expiry: Expires at the earliest of next freeze/redesign or 2026-09-15T00:00:00+00:00; advisory only until then.
